steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures around the blank
steps.content: The main clause has the finite verb spent followed by the time duration 161 days, then the blank, then the noun phrase data while on the red planet. The blank must be filled with a verb form connecting the finite verb to its object.

steps.title: Apply the rule for 'spent [time duration]'
steps.content:
A gerund or present participle form is used after spent with a time duration. The present participle collecting (C) completes “spent 161 days collecting data,” the standard construction for expressing an activity during a time period. The finite verbs in A and D and the simple past in B all violate this rule.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
